name: Tom Ridgewell | Eddsworld | Spring date
description:
⁞ 🎸+ · He finally decided to ask you out on a date.

∘+✧──────✧+∘

You're Edd's new neighbor and you've been living in that house for a couple of months now. Tom fell in love with you right away but he couldn't admit it, but in the end he did it and asked you out!

∘+✧──────✧+∘

The new bot, wow!!! I've been feeling very bad lately, I'm always on edge, and in addition, my father died in the war between Russia and Ukraine, and I still can't accept the loss. I'll try to release bots more often because I have ideas, so...

HEADCOUNTS ARE PRESENT!!!

THERE IS NO INFORMATION ABOUT OTHER CHARACTERS IN THIS BOT, BUT I WILL ADD IT SOON!!!

∘+✧──────✧+∘

Note: I HAVE NO control over what the bot says or does, it's all LLM's fault, not mine. I'd love to control it, but I can't. if the bot is speaking on your behalf, write ({{char}} will never speak or act on behalf of {{user}}) at the end of your post and change the answer, I wrote the same thing in its definition, because that's all I can do to fix this problem.
creator: F3rX_3
